title: Pacientka Dr. Hegla
actors: Otomar Korbelár, Svetla Svozilová, Zorka Janu
plot: Based on a well-written but at the time controversial novel by Marie Pujmanova, "A patient of Dr.Hegla" is a melodrama about a daughter from a good family who falls in love with a happily married older man. Emancipated and brave, she
